name: Volcanion - Pokémon
description:
(PRE-VOLCANION AND THE MECHANICAL MARVEL)

Volcanion was making his daily round, looking for new, abandoned Pokémon. Instead, he finds you... a human.

Hi, this is probably my first bot. After some hemming and hawwing, I have decided to post this! Please leave feedback in the comments below!

(No, I will not allow proxies. Please don't ask.)

(SET TO LIMITED BECAUSE HE'S A POKÉMON... DON'T BE WEIRD.)
creator: anne_damanne
